response:
Start at the main pedestrian park exit by the playground:
1.  Turn right out of the park exit onto the sidewalk.
2.  Walk 3 straight blocks, then turn left at the crosswalk by the corner coffee shop.
3.  Continue 1 block, then turn right at the public bike rack.
4.  Walk 2 more blocks, then turn left at the 4-way stop sign.
5.  The library entrance will be immediately on your right.
